notes: Persian satrap and military commander, known for his zealous support of the Lacedaemonians during the Peloponnesian War.

docs.title: Life of Lysander
docs.author: Plutarch
docs.excerpt: … Lacedaemonians, having been the most zealous on their side in the war of all the king’s captains. But after the magistrates had read the letter they showed it him, and he understanding now that Others beside Ulysses deep can be, Not the one wise man of the world is he, in extreme confusion,
